import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../App'; import './ProfilePage.css'; export default function ProfilePage() { const { user, logout, addToast } = useAuth(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const [editing, setEditing] = useState(false); const [form, setForm] = useState({ firstName: user?.firstName || '', lastName: user?.lastName || '', email: 'coordinator@college.edu', college: 'Veermata Jijabai Technological Institute', department: 'Computer Engineering', position: 'Assistant Professor', phone: '9876543210', state: 'Maharashtra', }); const [saved, setSaved] = useState(false); if (!user) { return (
🔒

Sign in required

Sign in
); } const initials = (form.firstName?.[0] || '') + (form.lastName?.[0] || ''); const handleSave = async (e) => { e.preventDefault(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 600)); setEditing(false); setSaved(true); addToast('Profile updated successfully', 'success'); setTimeout(() => setSaved(false), 3000); }; const set = (f) => (e) => setForm(p => ({ ...p, [f]: e.target.value })); return (

) : (
{[ { label: 'Full Name', value: `${form.firstName} ${form.lastName}` }, { label: 'Email', value: form.email }, { label: 'Phone', value: form.phone }, { label: 'College', value: form.college }, { label: 'Department', value: form.department }, { label: 'Position', value: form.position }, { label: 'State', value: form.state }, ].map(row => (
{row.label} {row.value || '—'}
))}
)}
); }
